repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orth_uniform/v1: named variance maps have no projection frontier; population DML/LRO/ADML variance maps coincide at truth

published_prior_art.cite: Newey1994Econometrica: same first-order influence/canonical gradient pins first-order semiparametric variance

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orth_uniform/v1 is closest but stopped at certified matrices and explicitly did not derive a published-rule frontier

published_prior_art.cite: none; verified DML/LRO/ADML and weak-overlap papers do not give a three-report iff spectral frontier

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orth_uniform/v1: certified finite-dimensional projection matrices and two-cell audit witness

published_prior_art.cite: none; no checked DML/LRO/ADML source gives the common finite-support audit table

repo_prior_art.cite: none; v1 did not classify the LRO normalization class equivalent to ADML

published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovEscancianoIchimuraNeweyRobins2022LRO and ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022ADML do not classify ATE-specialized LRO normalizations equivalent to ADML reports

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The guardrail duplicates eid_dml_orth_uniform/v1's population-variance no-frontier result; keep it as a guardrail or move it out of the novelty-bearing result list.

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The common-EIF first-order variance equivalence is already covered by Newey1994Econometrica and standard semiparametric variance logic.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The 'exact published' LRO and ADML report summands still depend on unspecified placeholders q_n and kappa_A, so the Gamma matrices are not yet well-defined mathematical objects.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Assumption 4 says Section 8 quantifies over all A in the LRO normalization class, but Conjecture 2 admits an LRO-ADML equivalence class, contradicting Conjecture 1's strict LRO-ADML separation branch unless the quantifier is narrowed.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The S_n-orthogonal projection is defined on nuisance-direction coordinates, but the conjecture applies it to random-variable spans involving kappa_A and alpha_n(Y-mu_D), so the projection space and inner product do not match.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace q_n and kappa_A placeholders with explicit DML/LRO/ADML ATE report formulas, including dimensions of A_n, q_n, G_A,n, and the random-variable space for kappa_A.
State Conjecture 1 for a fixed published LRO normalization, or explicitly restrict it to A outside the Conjecture 2 equivalence class.
Move Theorem 1 to a guardrail proposition or sanity-check corollary so the §8 theorem list does not include an already-known result as a novelty-bearing item.
Add a finite two- or three-cell worked symbolic template showing the exact Gamma_DML,LRO and Gamma_LRO,ADML entries from the report formulas, not just from abstract certificates.

recommended_next_step: Patch the report definitions and LRO quantifiers; the flagship frontier remains plausible, but the current statement is not well-posed enough to accept.
